inputs.reasoning: Named capture group with word character class exercises named group parsing and \w class compilation
Nested repetition triggers special handling for potentially ambiguous repetition in compiler
Unicode script property class exercises Unicode category parsing and compilation
Negated character class with hex escape ranges exercises non-ASCII range handling
Large counted repetition exercises the repeat unrolling logic in the compiler
Non-capturing group with alternation and counted repetition stresses alternation+repeat compilation
Inline flag toggling within non-capturing groups exercises flag parsing and scoping
Multiple Unicode category properties (uppercase/lowercase letters) with repetition
Deeply nested alternation with multiple capture groups exercises subgroup numbering
Character class containing Unicode property escapes mixed with literals exercises class merging
